description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house surrounded by a well-maintained yard with several mature trees and a paved driveway leading to the street. The structure features a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofs, with a combination of dark and light exterior wall finishes, likely using materials such as concrete, stucco, and glass. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a garage on one side, and the main entrance is set back from the street, accessible via a walkway. The landscaping is minimalistic, with grass lawns and strategically placed trees enhancing privacy and curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of functional and decorative elements typical of modern residential architecture.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat and sloped roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with mature trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side yard, and the elongated structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and more of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, paved walkway, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and trees.
